overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a rural dirt path during a dramatic red sunset. The character follows guards with torches through a wooden gate, then continues alone through open countryside before passing a civilian, with the sky transitioning from vivid orange to deep twilight.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt road at sunset with stone walls

events.description: Geralt walks through the large wooden gate structure framing the path
guards with torches move off to the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the dirt path following a group of guards carrying torches

notable_agents.action: group of guards walking ahead carrying lit torches

entered.detail: low stone wall running alongside the left side of the path
large wooden portal structure framing the path ahead
winding dirt trail through grassy countryside
dark tree line on the horizon against the red sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a rural dirt path at sunset, following a group of torch-bearing guards. A stone wall runs along the left side as they approach and pass through a large wooden gate structure. The sky is filled with dramatic red and orange clouds.

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking alone along the winding path as the sunset colors deepen and the landscape opens up

entered.detail: rocks and boulders scattered in the grass beside the path

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the gate, Geralt walks alone through open countryside. The stone wall and gate fall behind as the path winds through grassy terrain with scattered rocks. The red sunset dominates the sky with a dark forest visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path near water at twilight

events.description: Geralt passes a civilian standing on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaches and passes a civilian standing on the path as the light fades to twilight

notable_agents.action: civilian in blue shirt standing on the path facing as Geralt passes

entered.detail: calm water visible to the right of the path reflecting the darkening sky
simple wooden fence posts along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: As twilight deepens, Geralt walks past a civilian standing by the path. A body of water appears to the right, bordered by a simple wooden fence. The sky transitions from vivid red to darker purple tones as night approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural path as a dramatic red sunset fades into the deep purple of twilight. It begins with Geralt following a group of torch-bearing guards past a stone wall and through a large wooden gate under a sky of vivid orange clouds. As the gate falls behind, the scene opens into a wide countryside where the character walks alone through grassy terrain and scattered rocks toward a dark forest on the horizon. The environment then shifts as the path leads past a standing civilian and a wooden fence bordering a body of water, while the lighting transitions from fiery red to the darker tones of approaching night.
